hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '(^|;[[:space:]]*|&&[[:space:]]*|[|][|][[:space:]]*|[|][[:space:]]*)rm[[:space:]]' && echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '(^|[[:space:]])-[a-zA-Z]*[rR]|--recursive' && echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '(^|[[:space:]])-[a-zA-Z]*[fF]|--force'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use trash instead of rm -rf' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|][[:space:]]*)pip3?[[:space:]]+(install|uninstall)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use uv instead of pip' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|][[:space:]]*)poetry[[:space:]]+(install|add|remove|update)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use uv instead of poetry' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|][[:space:]]*)(black|pylint|flake8)[[:space:]]'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use ruff instead of black/pylint/flake8' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|][[:space:]]*)(mypy|pyright)[[:space:]]'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use ty instead of mypy/pyright' >&2; exit 2; fi
CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|][[:space:]]*)(eslint|prettier)[[:space:]]'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use oxlint/oxfmt instead of eslint/prettier' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|][[:space:]]*)grep[[:space:]]'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use rg (ripgrep) instead of grep' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|][[:space:]]*)find[[:space:]]'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use fd instead of find' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+add' && echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '[[:space:]][.]env([[:space:]]|$)|[.]pem([[:space:]]|$)|[.]key([[:space:]]|$)|credentials|[.]secret([[:space:]]|$)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not stage secret files (.env, .pem, .key, credentials)' >&2; exit 2; fi
CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE 'Co-Authored-By:.*anthropic'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not add Co-Authored-By attribution to commits' >&2; exit 2; fi
